objective: Measure a minimum Jetson GStreamer/NVMM decode and conversion path before attempting EIS pipeline integration.

input.claim_boundary: This clip and pipeline prove dataflow readiness and latency only, not EIS quality or stabilization performance.

pipeline_under_test.name: decode_nvmm_convert_fakesink
pipeline_under_test.gst_pipeline: filesrc location=data/raw/sample_1920x1080_from4k.mp4 ! qtdemux ! h264parse ! nvv4l2decoder ! video/x-raw(memory:NVMM),format=NV12 ! nvvidconv ! video/x-raw,format=BGRx ! fakesink sync=false

can_promote_to_next_contract_if: runtime is recorded for at least one input
the CPU/NVMM boundary is stated explicitly

state_update_policy: Record exact pipeline, plugin availability, runtime, blocker, and next dataflow question only.

recovery_path.required_plugin_missing: Use docs/knowledge_base/routing.md and public Jetson GStreamer references before changing the environment.
recovery_path.caps_negotiation_failed: Reduce caps to a simpler NVMM decode-to-fakesink path, then add conversion back one step at a time.
recovery_path.needs_eis_integration: Stop and create a new contract; do not combine probe and integration in one loop.
